name: Abacus
description: Beads sliding along their rods to new positions on every redraw — an abacus forever recounting itself.

code.style: --bead1: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --bead2: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --abx1: @rand(2%, 62%); --abx2: @rand(2%, 62%); --show2: @p(0, 1, 1); --rule: ( background: linear-gradient(transparent 48.75%, var(--color1) 48.75% 51.25%, transparent 51.25%); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 17%; height: 30%; left: var(--abx1); top: 35%; border-radius: 40%; background: var(--bead1); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 17%; height: 30%; left: var(--abx2); top: 35%; border-radius: 40%; background: var(--bead2); opacity: var(--show2); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
